title: ScenarioExecutionDescription
description: Structured data describing a complete scenario from external stimulus to system response, along with its internal sub-scenarios, designed to help AI understand business logic and perform secondary development.

scenario_id.description: Unique identifier for the entire response scenario (from external stimulus to final response).

scenario_name.description: Descriptive name of the complete scenario.

summary.description: High-level summary of the scenario processing, explaining how the system responds to the external stimulus and the core business logic involved.

tags.description: Keyword tags for vector retrieval and classification (e.g., 'async-pipeline', 'event-driven', 'batch-processing').

sub_scenarios.description: List of independent sub-scenarios or specific execution flows decomposed from the overall scenario.

sub_scenario_id.description: Unique identifier for the current sub-scenario / execution flow (e.g., 'test_pipeline').

intent.description: Core business purpose or design intent of this sub-scenario. During secondary development, AI will use this field to determine whether the logic block meets development requirements.

participating_threads.description: Threads participating in this sub-scenario and their logical role mappings.

thread_id.description: Thread ID from the original call stack (e.g., 'Thread-3').

role.description: Role that this thread plays in the business logic (e.g., 'Coordinator', 'Worker', 'Event-Dispatcher').

description.description: Brief description of the specific work this thread is responsible for within the sub-scenario.

execution_flow.description: Execution steps described in chronological order. Should explain the interactions between components, data flow, and thread collaboration process.

items.description: Description of a single execution step.
